# FridgeSpy

> FridgeSpy tracks every item in your fridge and pantry with AI receipt and fridge scanning so you cook from what you have and stop wasting food.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of FridgeSpy — what's in your kitchen, expiring soon, recent activity.
- [Sign in](/login): Create a FridgeSpy account or sign in.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How FridgeSpy collects, uses, and protects your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): The agreement between you and FridgeSpy.
